2604.12651.title: Learning Chain Of Thoughts Prompts for Predicting Entities, Relations, and even Literals on Knowledge Graphs
2604.12651.paper_summary: Knowledge graph embedding (KGE) models perform well on link prediction but struggle with unseen entities, relations, and especially literals, limiting their use in dynamic, heterogeneous graphs. In contrast, pretrained large language models (LLMs) generalize effectively through prompting. We reformulate link prediction as a prompt learning problem and introduce RALP, which learns string-based chain-of-thought (CoT) prompts as scoring functions for triples. Using Bayesian Optimization through MIPRO algorithm, RALP identifies effective prompts from fewer than 30 training examples without gradient access. At inference, RALP predicts missing entities, relations or whole triples and assigns confidence scores based on the learned prompt. We evaluate on transductive, numerical, and OWL instance retrieval benchmarks. RALP improves state-of-the-art KGE models by over 5% MRR across datasets and enhances generalization via high-quality inferred triples. On OWL reasoning tasks with complex class expressions (e.g., $\exists hasChild.Female$, $\geq 5 \; hasChild.Female$), it achieves over 88% Jaccard similarity. These results highlight prompt-based LLM reasoning as a flexible alternative to embedding-based methods. We release our implementation, training, and evaluation pipeline as open source: https://github.com/dice-group/RALP .
2604.12651.paper_summary_zh: 知識圖譜嵌入（KGE）模型在鏈接預測上表現良好，但在面對未見過的實體、關係，特別是文字時，表現不佳，這限制了它們在動態異構圖中的應用。相對而言，預訓練的大型語言模型（LLMs）通過提示有效地進行泛化。我們將鏈接預測重新表述為一個提示學習問題，並引入 RALP，該模型學習基於字符串的思維鏈（CoT）提示作為三元組的評分函數。通過 MIPRO 算法使用貝葉斯優化，RALP 從少於 30 個訓練樣本中識別有效提示，而無需梯度訪問。在推斷過程中，RALP 預測缺失的實體、關係或整個三元組，並根據學習到的提示分配置信度分數。我們在傳導性、數值和 OWL 實例檢索基準上進行評估。RALP 在各數據集上提高了最先進的 KGE 模型超過 5% 的 MRR，並通過高質量的推斷三元組增強泛化能力。在具有複雜類表達式的 OWL 推理任務（例如，$\exists hasChild.Female$，$\geq 5 \; hasChild.Female$）中，它達到了超過 88% 的 Jaccard 相似度。這些結果突顯了基於提示的 LLM 推理作為嵌入基礎方法的靈活替代方案。我們將實現、訓練和評估管道作為開源釋出：https://github.com/dice-group/RALP 。
2604.12651.author: Alkid Baci et.al.
2604.12651.authors: Alkid Baci, Luke Friedrichs, Caglar Demir, N'Dah Jean Kouagou, Axel-Cyrille Ngonga Ngomo
